caseName: United States ex rel. Brensilber v. Bausch & Lomb Optical Co.
caseNameFull: United States ex rel. Brensilber v. Bausch & Lomb Optical Co.
attorneys: Mr. Homer Cummings for petitioners. Mr. Whitney North Seymour for the Bauseh & Lomb Optical Co. et al.; and Mr. Raymond M. White for Carl Zeiss, Inc., — respondents. Solicitor General Fahy and Assistant Attorney General Tom C. Clark filed a brief on behalf of the United States, as amicus curiae, in support of the petition.
